calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2005 Continued To Jun-22-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Michael Heath, Esq. for Plaintiff:Cooper & Robinson, Inc., a California Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael Waldman, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kenneth Dewayne Wells..
The Court taken this matter under submission, amount of Judgment to be determined.

May 2, 2005
Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kenneth Dewayne Wells as follows:
Damages $3,284.50
Attorney's fees $660.00
Costs $198.50 for a total of $4,143.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-11-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2005 Text Ruling
